parameters.text:
=You are a professional LinkedIn content creator.

Create a LinkedIn post about Business Automation.

Include:

1. Attention-grabbing hook
2. What automation is
3. Key benefits:

   * Time saving
   * Error reduction
   * Increased productivity
   * Better customer experience
4. One real-world example
5. Future of AI and automation
6. Call to action
7. 5-8 relevant hashtags

Also provide:

Image Title:
Image Description:
AI Image Prompt:

The AI Image Prompt should describe a professional LinkedIn banner showing business automation, AI workflows, dashboards, data flow, robotic process automation, digital transformation, productivity growth, modern office environment, professional corporate style, high quality, realistic, suitable for LinkedIn.

Return output in this format:

Date:
Topic:
Hook:
Content:
Image Title:
Image Description:
AI Image Prompt:
Hashtags:
Status:

parameters.subject: Daily AI Content Idea
